new_jobs.title: IP Network Engineer
new_jobs.category: Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
انجام امور تخنیکی ترانسمیشن نظربه لزوم دید و ضروریات اداره

Duties and Responsibilities
· تهیه و ترتیب گزارشات منظم و پربودیک در مورد عملکرد شبکه ترانسمیشن.
· نظارت و کنترول تخنیکی از شبکه ترانسمیشن (مایکروویف)
· کنفگربشن در انواع مختلف تجهیزات ترانسمیشن (مایکروویف)
· نصب و مونتاژ لینک های مایکرویف و سایر تجهیزات ترانسمیشن
· نظارت و هماهنگی در تهیه انواع عملکردها / اطلاعات مربوط به بهره برداری و نگهداری از شبکه ترانسمیشن
· اطمینان از مناسب وصحت بودن گزارشات و حفظ و کنترول آن مطابق با قوانین و مقررات تخنیکی مخابراتی
· همکاری با دیپارتمنت های ذیدخل در حل مشکلات پیش آمده و فعال نمودن سایت های جدید
· اجرای امور تخنیکی پروژه های ترانسمیشن با مسئولیت کامل جهت به اکمال تمام اهداف معینه
· سایر وظایف را که از طرف مدیر دیپارتمنت برایش هدایت داده میشود.

Job Requirements
تحصیلات : حداقل داشتن سند تحصیلی در یکی از رشته­های انجنیری مخابرات وتکنالوجی معلوماتی،انجنیری الکترونیکی.
تجارب : داشتن حداقل 7 سال تجربه کاری در بخش ترانسمیشن
مهارت های دیگر:
1. تسلط به زبان­های(پشتو،دری وانگلیسی) و آشنایی تحریر و تکلم با زبان های متذکره.
2. مهارت­های کمپیوتری مانند( word, Excel, Access )و سایر سافت ویر های تخنیکی مرتبط به یرنامه های ترانسمیشن و مخابراتی.
3. آشنای کامل باطرح ودیزاین َو چگونگی کارکردگی شبکه های GSM و Transmission .
4. مهارتهای عالی در کار تیمی و همکاری های همه جانبه باهمکاران.
5. آشنایی کامل با سافتویر (نرم افزار) های لنک های مایکروویف و سیستم NMS آنها.

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (IP Network Eng-002) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

new_jobs.title: IT & Digital Communications Officer (Re Announced)
new_jobs.description:
About MSI Afghanistan Reproductive Choices
About MSI Afghanistan Reproductive Choices:
MSI Reproductive Choices Afghanistan (MSIA) is a branch of MSI, a global, non-profit, and non-governmental organization headquartered in London, UK, and was established in August 2002 after registration with the Government of Afghanistan. MSIA follows the local mission statement of MSI: Improve Afghan women’s health and well-being so that they can, in turn, build strong, healthy families. Our vision is to be the organization that Afghan women seek out for high-quality, client-centered health care provided by women, for women.
We focus on reducing maternal mortality by providing quality and sustainable maternal-child health (MCH) and reproductive health (RH) services and information in 19 provinces of Afghanistan, namely Kabul, Balkh, Herat, Jawzjan Faryab, Nangarhar, Helmand, Kandahar, Baghlan, Kunduz, Badakhshan, Takhar, Samangan, Kapisa, Khost, Paktia, Ghor, Farah and Bamyan in coordination with the Ministry of Public Health (MoPH) of Afghanistan.
MSIA strives to enhance women's health outcomes in the aforementioned provinces by delivering vital reproductive and maternal-child health services through multiple channels such as centers, outreaches, the private sector, and MS Ladies (Family Health Houses).

Job Description
PURPOSE
The IT & Digital Communications Officer is a member of the Security, IT and Transport team and reports to the team lead. This team combines a number of functions in supporting the success of the whole programme, namely: IT systems; collection, analysis and dissemination of service data essential for programme analysis and response; marketing; policy development; and the leadership of the MSIA contact centre. In addition, the IT & Digital Communications Officer is responsible for ensuring smooth IT operations, managing the organization’s digital presence, and producing high-quality visual content. The role supports internal staff with technical assistance, maintains systems and equipment, enhances online visibility, and develops creative materials aligned with the organization’s branding and communication strategies.
Information Technology (IT) Responsibilities:
Ensure that MSIA is served with the most cost-effective IT hardware and software to maintain its programme activities safely and efficiently. Specifically
Provide daily technical support to staff, including troubleshooting hardware, software, and network issues.
Ensure proper maintenance of computers, printers, internet connectivity, and backup systems.
Install, configure, and update software and hardware as needed.
Maintain IT inventory records, including equipment issuance, condition, and replacements.
Monitor system security, antivirus updates, and data protection measures.
Coordinate with external service providers when required.
Support staff with email setup, cloud storage access, and system accounts.
Database development and maintenance.
B. Social Media Management
Develop and implement social media plans aligned with organizational goals.
Manage social media pages (MSIA website, Facebook, Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, etc.).
Create engaging content, including posts, captions, short videos, and social media campaigns.
Monitor online engagement, respond to comments/messages when relevant, and escalate issues when needed.
Analyse social media insights and prepare monthly performance reports.
Ensure all online communication reflects the organization’s values and brand guidelines.
C. Graphic Design & Creative Production
Design high-quality communication materials, including brochures, posters, banners, reports, infographics, annual reports, and presentations.
Produce multimedia content such as photos, videos, animations, and social media graphics.
Work closely with communications and operations teams to meet their design needs.
Ensure all designs follow organizational branding guidelines.
Edit and finalize materials for printing or digital dissemination.
Maintain an organized digital library of photos, videos, and design assets.
TECHNICAL SUPPORT
Provide first- and second-line technical support for MSIA staff, directly and through a helpdesk. Specifically,
Support new user set up, creating new user accounts, including user folders and shares, emails and mailboxes.
Address technical issues and ensuring smooth operation of IT systems.
Diagnose user faults such as log in issues, profile faults, and permission errors.
Assist in diagnosing and resolving software faults and providing support for installed applications.
Raise tickets with global IT helpdesk when necessary
HARDWARE, SOFTWARE AND NETWORK CONFIGURATION
Ensure that MSIA hardware, software and networks are routinely upgraded to maintain its programme activities safely and efficiently. Specifically,
Configure and install new or replacement PCs, servers, and peripheral hardware including printers, projectors, and scanners.
Install and support new networking hardware such as switches and wireless access points.
Diagnose and resolve network issues
Perform patch/upgrade testing as part of the patch management processes and ensure the security of the IT infrastructure through maintenance and monitoring of antivirus, patching, and network monitoring.
Undertake proactive research into system upgrades
AUDIO/VISUAL AND SECURITY SYSTEMS SUPPORT
Provide specific technical support for systems related to programme work and security. Specifically
Special events : Provide Audio/Visual equipment support for MSIA events, both internal and external.
Office Security : Ensure all CCTV equipment operates correctly
Office Access : Set up and update the door access control system as requested.
Communications : Manage and configure MSIA telephone extension systems.

Job Requirements
KNOWLEDGE/QUALIFICATIONS
Bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer Science, designer, Multimedia, Communications, or related field.
Strong knowledge of cyber security and the emergent risks of data use and management, graphic designing and social media management
SKILLS/PROVEN EXPERIENCE
Minimum 2–3 years of experience in IT support, social media management, and graphic design.
Strong knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) or similar design software.
Experience with social media platforms and content creation tools.
Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.
Photography and videography skills are an asset.
Strong communication skills and the ability to work under pressure.
Competencies
Excellent time management and multitasking abilities
Creativity and attention to detail
Strong teamwork and collaboration
Professional ethics and commitment to confidentiality
Adaptability and willingness to learn
Work Conditions
Standard office environment
Occasional travel for field visits, events, and media coverage
Availability outside working hours during emergencies or major events
ATTITUDES
Fully committed to MSIA mission, vision, objective, goal
Service oriented
Self-motivated and able to remain results focused in working alone
Persuasive in the face of end-user resistance
Honest, reliable and maintains confidentiality
Safeguarding:
MSI Reproductive Choices places human dignity at the center of its relief and development work. At the heart of MSI Afghanistan's efforts to address health, medical needs, and social justice is its engagement with marginalized communities, vulnerable adults, children, and maternal health.
MSI Afghanistan values maternal health and child protection, emphasizing that these groups are particularly at risk of sexual exploitation and abuse. MSI Reproductive Choices is committed to protecting vulnerable adults and children from sexual harassment, exploitation, and abuse, involving MSI Afghanistan employees and related personnel.
MSI Afghanistan has a zero-tolerance policy toward sexual exploitation, abuse, and child abuse. We take all concerns and complaints regarding sexual exploitation, harassment, abuse, and child abuse involving MSI employees and related personnel very seriously.
All MSI Afghanistan offers of employment are subject to satisfactory references and appropriate screening checks. By applying, the applicant confirms understanding of these recruitment procedures.

Submission Guideline
Submission Guideline:
Interested and qualified candidates are requested to fill out the MSI-A application form by clicking the link below and send a copy of their updated CV (no educational or job certifications) by the closing date.
Please note that MSI-A does not charge applicants any recruitment fees. MSI-A is an equal-opportunity employer with a strong commitment to diversity at all levels. MSI-A has a strict non-discriminatory policy in its hiring and selection processes. All applicants will receive equal consideration, and applicants from all ethnic, racial, and economic backgrounds are encouraged to apply.
Please be aware that only those candidates who have been shortlisted will be contacted.

Submission Email
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdBTW7sEt0E8g9DCa6mDcrsHq8jIiaVOtJda2cVCTy1HMMNOQ/viewform?usp=publish-editor

new_jobs.title: آمریت بخش تکنالوژی معلوماتی (IT)
new_jobs.description:
About Rokhan Group
Rokhan Group is a leading group in Medical Sector Including Medical Universities, Hospitals, Schools and Construction Companies in different cities of Afghanistan.

Job Description
وظايف ومسؤليت هاى سپرده شده:
مدیریت و نظارت از تمام سیستم‌ها، شبکه‌ها و تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی پوهنتون.
همکاری با ریاست پوهنتون در بخش‌های تخنیکی، معلوماتی و دیجیتلی.
ارایه مشوره‌های لازم به ریاست پوهنتون در زمینه تکنالوژی معلوماتی، سیستم‌های نرم‌افزاری و امنیت معلومات.
نصب، تنظیم و مراقبت از شبکه‌های انترنتی، سرورها، سیستم‌های کامپیوتری و تجهیزات IT پوهنتون.
نظارت از سیستم ثبت و مدیریت معلومات مریضان (HIS) و اطمینان از فعالیت درست آن.
حفظ و مراقبت از دیتابیس‌ها، اسناد دیجیتلی و معلومات محرمانه پوهنتون.
اتخاذ تدابیر لازم جهت تامین امنیت سایبری، جلوگیری از ضایع شدن معلومات و حفاظت از سیستم‌ها در برابر تهدیدات تخنیکی.
فراهم‌سازی خدمات تخنیکی و حل مشکلات نرم‌افزاری و سخت‌افزاری کارمندان و بخش‌های مختلف پوهنتون.
مدیریت و نظارت از سیستم‌های کمره‌های امنیتی، بایومتریک، مخابرات داخلی و سایر تجهیزات الکترونیکی.
تهیه پلان‌ها و برنامه‌های انکشافی در بخش تکنالوژی معلوماتی مطابق نیازمندی‌های پوهنتون.
نظارت از نصب و استفاده درست نرم‌افزارهای اداری، مالی، طبی و سیستم‌های اتومات پوهنتون.
تهیه و تنظیم راپورهای ماهوار و سالانه فعالیت‌های آمریت تکنالوژی معلوماتی و ارایه آن به مقام ریاست پوهنتون.
هماهنگی با شرکت‌های تخنیکی و خدماتی در بخش خریداری، ترمیم و نگهداری تجهیزات IT.
آموزش و ارتقای ظرفیت کارمندان در استفاده از سیستم‌های تکنالوژی معلوماتی و نرم‌افزارهای مورد استفاده.
نظارت از فعالیت ویب‌سایت، صفحات اجتماعی و سیستم‌های آنلاین پوهنتون.
تهیه و ترتیب نیازمندی‌های تخنیکی و تجهیزات IT جهت بهبود خدمات پوهنتون.
رسیدگی به موقع به ترمیمات و مراقبت از تجهیزات تخنیکی و سیستم‌های الکترونیکی پوهنتون.
تنظیم و نگهداری آرشیف دیجیتلی و اسناد الکترونیکی مربوط به پوهنتون.
فراهم‌آوری تسهیلات تخنیکی لازم برای کنفرانس‌ها، جلسات، سیمینارها و برنامه‌های آنلاین پوهنتون.
نظارت از استفاده معیاری و مصئون تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی توسط کارمندان.
ارزیابی و پیشنهاد سیستم‌ها و تکنالوژی‌های جدید جهت بهبود خدمات صحی و اداری پوهنتون.
هماهنگی با سایر آمریت‌ها و بخش‌ها جهت دیجیتلی‌سازی امور اداری و خدماتی.
حفظ محرميت معلومات و اسناد دیجیتلی مطابق قوانین و مقررات اداره.
اجرای سایر وظایف که از طرف مقامات ذیصلاح مطابق قوانین، مقررات و اهداف اداره سپرده می‌شود.

Job Requirements
Job Requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
Proven experience as an IT Officer, IT Administrator, or in a similar technical role.
Strong understanding of computer systems, networking, database management, cybersecurity, and IT support services.
High proficiency in operating systems, MS Office applications, networking tools, and troubleshooting hardware and software issues.
Experience in managing servers, internet networks, CCTV systems, and hospital information systems (HIS).
Ability to diagnose and resolve technical problems effectively under pressure and within limited timeframes.
Strong communication, problem-solving, and interpersonal skills.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates should submit their CVs to rafiuddinshahid@outlook.com please specify the vacancy number in the email subject line; otherwise, and your application will not be considered.

Submission Email
rafiuddinshahid@outlook.com

new_jobs.title: System Administrator
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The System Administrator is responsible for the end-to-end management and security of the ISP’s core network infrastructures, including firewalls, routers, switches, and servers across multiple sites. This role supports customers by ensuring stable internet connectivity and reliable service through precise configuration, continuous monitoring, and rapid incident resolution. It also ensures maximum network uptime and peak performance across the infrastructure. Key responsibilities include managing link provisioning, bandwidth allocation, IP address management, and collaboration with upstream providers.

Duties and Responsibilities
Network Infrastructure & Security
· Install, configure, and maintain core routers, switches, and firewalls, ensuring scalability and adaptability to future growth.
· Oversee the operation and firmware updates of primary and secondary firewalls across Main Office and Provincial sites, ensuring optimal performance and security.
· Monitor spanning tree protocols on switches, ensuring data flows through primary point-to-point links and addressing any issues.
· Protect CPE and PTP devices from external network attacks by blocking unauthorized ports and ensuring secure network access.
· Identify customer bandwidth over-usage through weekly monitoring via Cacti servers, apply traffic shaping on CPE devices if limiters fail, and ensure no customer exceeds their contracted bandwidth.
2. Link & Bandwidth Management
· Process link activations, upgrades, downgrades, and suspensions through CRM and coordination with the collections department, ensuring seamless integration with core firewall systems.
· Administer the firewall system dedicated to hotspot users, generating new accounts and allocating bandwidth based on user requirements.
· Record customers’ day and night bandwidth usage and update the records daily; monitor to prevent overload during peak hours, and request bandwidth upgrades for the main office and branches as needed.
· Manage firewall time schedulers for day and night bandwidth allocations, optimizing network usage.
· Oversee demo internet link connections, ensuring customer satisfaction during trial periods.
· Administer customer requests for temporary bandwidth upgrades, ensuring seamless service delivery.
3. Server & System Maintenance
· Conduct monthly HDD diagnostics on the primary server, ensuring data security and system health.
· Maintain and update the Primary and Secondary Cacti servers to ensure better functionality and apply available updates.
· Monitor UCRM server health and apply updates as they become available.
· Monitor NTP server health, specifically for PTP, CPE, and the bandwidth scheduler.
· Maintain EMCO server IP addresses and register new PTP and PTMP links for the alerting system in case of downtime.
4. IP & Device Management
· Update IP allocation sheets for Main office and provincial branches, including devices license keys.
· Monitor the locations of high-capacity devices and their connected base stations.
· Maintain records of customers and sites’ equipment serial numbers for asset record.
5. Monitoring & Troubleshooting
· Identify and resolve WAN, LAN, and WLAN issues promptly to maintain network stability.
· Utilize Intermapper to assess microwave device capacities, ensuring no device is overloaded.
· Update and monitor the WLAN virtualized Layer 2 map for new sector and switch installations, ensuring all PTP devices operate above 10 Mbps LAN speed by actively monitoring the alerting system.
· Oversee the number of tickets created and closed by System/Helpdesk officers, ensuring timely and satisfactory resolution of technical issues.
6. Customer Support & Collaboration
· Collaborate quarterly with the collections department to reconcile active customer bandwidth allocations, including day and night usage.
· Provide online support to team members and customers for any technical-related issues, ensuring prompt resolution.
· Upstream Coordination: Serve as the primary liaison with upstream providers to diagnose and resolve link issues promptly, staying engaged until full resolution to ensure uninterrupted service.
7. Compliance & Web Filtering
· Continuously monitor web filter subnets and liaise with upstream providers to block URLs flagged by ATRA, ensuring permanent enforcement in full compliance with its official directives.
8. Additional Duties
· Perform any other tasks as assigned by management to support network operations and service delivery.

Job Requirements
Required: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Network Engineering, or a related field. Preference will be given to candidates with a Master’s degree in a related major field.
With a Bachelor’s degree: minimum of 5 years’ experience in system or network administration; with a Master’s degree: minimum of 3 years, preferably within an ISP environment.
CCNA and CCNP certifications are highly preferred.
Strong hands-on experience with Cisco, MikroTik, and Ubiquiti (UBQT) devices.
Advanced knowledge of network protocols, including TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, VLANs, and PPPoE.
Deep understanding of network security best practices and compliance with regulatory directives (e.g., ATRA).
Ability to analyze and resolve complex technical issues efficiently under pressure.
Excellent communication and reporting skills in Dari, Pashto, and English.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by Jun 10, 2026 . To apply, please send your updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af
In the subject line of your email, please ensure to include the Vacancy Number and Desired Province. e.g: (UAT-VA-SA-2152-J - Kabul) .
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test or interview process.

expiring_soon.title: IT Contractual Employee
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
Troubleshoot network in real time while maintaining high system availability and able to contribute ideas, share knowledge and help others to develop, in addition field engineer need to perform core network device initial installations, configurations under supervision and approval of line manager.
Monitor and maintain smooth operation and minor configurations in field network devices

Duties and Responsibilities
· Develop quarterly, Semi-annual and Annual Plan in compliance with the organizational plan.
· Oversight and technical assistant to head office and branch staff related to IT issues.
· Ensure proper maintenance of computers peripherals, printer, networking, internet & e-mail, security, data backup and recovery.
· Assist to install software, network, internet, email, printer and update antivirus for all head office and branches.
· Follow up, maintenance support IT system at regional Office and Branches.
· Train and guide user on using new software, PC maintenance and troubleshoot.
· Installs and configures computer hardware, software, systems, networks, printers, and scanners
· Provides technical leadership on a variety of highly specialized project-related activities requiring expertise in specific technical areas for core information technology systems and services.
· Maintains currency of knowledge with respect to relevant state-of-the-art technology, equipment, and/or systems.
· Performs miscellaneous job-related duties as assigned
· Participates as a member of the IT management team in planning, problem resolution, and reviewing department performance.
· Perform any other task assigned by the Line manager.
· Monitor and maintain IT Network Services that include E1 Connections smooth operation, and make sure network latency, network devices performance utilization report, field office and ISP customers regularly checked and report on time.
· Troubleshoot WAN/LAN networks in real time while maintaining high system availability.
· Make sure all security aspects, setting and configurations (like Firewall Rules, Mac Filtering, DoS settings, IPS settings, SSL settings, Encryption, Authentications, IP to user Mapping and etc.) are maintained under approved procedures.
· troubleshoot intranet, Internet, E1, P2P, resolve ISP customer daily issues.
· Maintain and mange Wireless Controllers, Access points, Firewalls, VPNs and Monitoring tools.
· Ensure daily activities are compliant with IT Policies and Procedures.
· Supervise junior IT staff and ensure quality services and support delivery.
· Review logs of network devices record and report suspicious activities.

Job Requirements
Education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technologies or related field.
Experience: Minimum of 1 year of experience working in same positions as Telecom Fraud Management Engineer, IT engineer, or IT Officer,
Skills Required:
· Strong understanding of a process driven environment
· Strong experience configuring and troubleshooting Cisco, ZTE, Huawei Routers and switches.
· Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities Required and Strong written and verbal and interpersonal skills
· Strong customer service experience required relevant professional certifications or training desirable.

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (IT Contractual -005) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

expiring_soon.title: IT Manager
expiring_soon.category: IT Billing, IT - Hardware, IT - Software, IT Support
expiring_soon.description: Role Summary AurumPay is seeking an experienced and hands-on IT Manager to lead and manage our core technical infrastructure. As a licensed Electronic Money Institution (EMI), this role is critical in ensuring 99.99% uptime , security, and regulatory compliance of our digital wallet platform. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in Oracle Solaris environments and Sophos security infrastructure , and will act as a bridge between development, security, and operations teams to ensure systems are secure, scalable, and audit-ready. Duties and Responsibilities Key Responsibilities 1. Server Infrastructure (Oracle Solaris & Enterprise Systems) Lead the installation, configuration, and hardening of Oracle Solaris servers Configure and manage Automated Installer (AI) for network-based provisioning Administer Oracle Solaris Zones (containers) to isolate application environments Monitor system performance, including kernel tuning and resource management (ZFS, DTrace) Implement backup strategies, including ZFS snapshots and disaster recovery procedures 2. Network Security (Sophos Firewall & Perimeter Defense) Deploy, configure, and maintain Sophos Firewall (XG/XGS series) Implement firewall policies, VLAN segmentation, and access control lists (ACLs) Manage secure connectivity through Site-to-Site (IPsec/SSL) and SSL VPN Monitor and optimize threat protection tools, including MDR, IPS, Web Filtering, and Application Control 3. EMI & Fintech Compliance · Ensure all configurations align with Central Bank (DAB) regulations for EMI operations. · Maintain logs for all access to financial systems; prepare for internal and external audits. · Lead IT audit and change management processes – no unapproved changes to firewall, Solaris zones, or payment integrations. · Manage Business Continuity (BCP) and Disaster Recovery (DR) drills with measurable targets: RTO < 1 hour, RPO < 15 minutes for transaction systems. 4. IT Operations & Management Manage Windows/Linux servers where the application stack interfaces with Solaris. Oversee vendor management for internet links and hardware procurement. Lead and support the internal IT helpdesk team 5. Budget & Vendor Management (Critical addition) · Prepare and manage the annual IT budget, including hardware, software licenses (Oracle, Sophos), and support contracts. · Negotiate with vendors for internet links, data center services, and hardware procurement. Job Requirements Required Technical Skills & Competencies Expert-level experience with Oracle Solaris, including installation, Zones, ZFS, and networking Proficiency in Linux (RedHat/CentOS) and Windows Server environments Strong expertise in Sophos Firewall (XG/XGS), including policy configuration, NAT, VPN, and high availability Solid understanding of networking concepts such as VLANs, TCP/IP, and routing protocols (BGP/OSPF) Familiarity with fintech systems and standards such as ISO 8583, 3D Secure, PCI DSS, and high-availability architectures Experience with virtualization technologies such as Solaris Zones, VMware vSphere, or similar platforms Experience & Qualifications Minimum 5+ years of experience in IT infrastructure management At least 3 years of hands-on experience with Oracle Solaris and Sophos security solutions Prior experience in fintech, banking, or EMI environments is required Preferred Certifications: Oracle Certified Professional (OCP) – Solaris Sophos Certified Architect or Engineer CCNA, ITIL v4 Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field Personal Attributes High level of integrity and ability to handle sensitive financial systems Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work under pressure Detail-oriented with a strong focus on documentation and audit readiness Submission Guidelines How to Apply: Interested and qualified candidates are invited to submit their CV and cover letter (in PDF format) to jobs@aurumaf.com Please mention the position title “IT Manager” in the subject line of your email. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

expiring_soon.title: NOC Contractual Engineer
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
The NOC Engineer is responsible for monitoring, maintaining, and troubleshooting the network infrastructure to ensure maximum availability and performance. This role supports real-time network operations, incident management, and proactive fault detection across core, access, and IP backbone (IPBB) networks.

Duties and Responsibilities
· Monitor network performance and availability using NMS tools (e.g., SolarWinds, PRTG, U2020, EMS, PRS)
· Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve network incidents
· Escalate complex issues to higher-level engineering teams when required
· Perform root cause analysis (RCA) and prepare incident reports
· Ensure SLA compliance and minimize network downtime
· Monitor alarms, events, and KPIs across IP, transmission, and core networks
· Support network changes, maintenance activities, and upgrades
· Maintain accurate network documentation and logs
· Coordinate with field teams, vendors, and internal departments
· Ensure proper ticket handling
Technical Skills Required
Strong understanding of:
TCP/IP, routing protocols
Switching technologies (VLAN)
IP Backbone (IPBB) networks
GSM/LTE/UMTS RAN/Core network basics
Experience with network monitoring tools (e.g., SolarWinds, PRTG, U2020, EMS, PRS)
Knowledge of Network Key Performance Indicators (KPI)
Soft Skills
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Ability to work under pressure in a 24/7 shift environment
Good communication and reporting skills
· Team collaboration and coordination ability

Job Requirements
Education: At least a Bachelor’s degree in ( BCS or ICTI ) or a related field.
Certifications (preferred but not mandatory):
CCNA / CCNP (Cisco)
Network+
ITIL Foundation
Work Experience:
1–3 years of experience in network operations or telecom environment
Fresh graduates with strong networking knowledge may also be considered
Other Skills:
· Full proficiency in one of the national languages (Pashto/Dari) and familiarity with the English language.
· Strong computer skills and proficiency in relevant software applications.
· 24/7 shift-based operations (including nights, weekends, holidays)
· Fast-paced NOC environment with real-time monitoring

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (NOC-004) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

expiring_soon.title: Database Developer National Consultant
expiring_soon.description:
About CTG
CTG was established in 2006, almost 20 years ago, in Afghanistan. We currently operate in 35 countries and have approximately 11,500 staff members committed to good!
But do you know who we are? And what do we do?
We provide tailored Human Resources and Staffing Solutions that support critical global initiatives across Humanitarian and Development sectors, and are now strategically foraying into new industries, including Construction, Energy, and IT, with a focus on high-risk regions.
Here’s a list of services we offer:
•Staffing solutions and HR management services
•Monitoring and evaluation
•Fleet management and logistics
•Facilities management
•Sustainability and Communications Advisory
•Election monitoring and observation
•IT professional services
•Medical assistance
Visit www.ctg.org to find out more.

Job Description
Background : The Afghanistan Food and Drug Authority (AFDA), as the national regulatory authority, is responsible for ensuring the quality, safety, and efficacy of medicines, medical devices, healthcare products, and food. Despite important progress, Afghanistan’s regulatory system continues to face challenges, including limited technical capacity, high dependence on imported products, inconsistent adherence to quality standards, and evolving systems for product registration, inspections, licensing, and market surveillance. Strengthening AFDA’s regulatory functions in alignment with WHO norms and standards is essential to protect public health, prevent substandard and falsified products, and support the country’s broader goals for health system resilience and universal health coverage.
To advance these priorities, AFDA is implementing regulatory reforms guided by the WHO Global Benchmarking Tool (GBT), which provides a structured framework for assessing regulatory maturity and developing Institutional Development Plans (IDPs). To accelerate progress, specialized technical support is required to strengthen GBT implementation, enhance capacity in GMP, regulatory workflows, medicines registration, regulatory information systems, and AMR-related oversight. The engagement of an international consultant will provide targeted expertise, hands-on mentoring, and capacity-building to AFDA staff, supporting the development of sustainable, evidence-based, and internationally aligned regulatory systems that effectively safeguard public health in Afghanistan.

Job Requirements
1. Purpose of the Consultancy:
The purpose of this post is to design, develop, and maintain high-quality databases to meet AFDA requirements. The incumbent ensures seamless integration between backend and frontend systems, delivers secure and maintainable code, and contributes to the overall efficiency and scalability of AFDA’s digital services.
2. Output:
The outputs of this post include scalable and secure web applications that provide reliable backend services and responsive frontend interfaces. The role ensures enhanced user experience, efficient database integration, and high application performance. By maintaining best practices and documentation, it supports future scalability, sustainable software maintenance, and the successful delivery of digital services.
3. Tasks:
· Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using Django (backend) and React + TypeScript (frontend).
· Build and optimize RESTful APIs and integrate with PostgreSQL databases.
· Implement clean, maintainable, and secure code following best practices.
· Collaborate with designers, product managers, and other developers to deliver high-quality features.
· Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance and write and maintain technical documentation
Deliverables:
Deliverable 1: Fully functional databases and Clean, maintainable, and secure code adhering to best practices.
Deliverable 2: Technical documentation covering system architecture, workflows, and APIs.
Deliverable 3: Optimized application performance, troubleshooting, and debugging reports.
Qualifications and experience:
Education :
Essential: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field. A Master’s degree is preferred and may be considered an asset.
Experience :
Essential: A minimum of 2 years of progressively responsible experience in database development, design, and Django, react.nexjs at a specialist level.
Skills / Technical skills and knowledge:
• Excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
• High sense of responsibility and strong organizational skills with ability to work under pressure.
• Advanced computer literacy (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.)
Languages :
• Excellent knowledge of English
• Good Local Languages (Pashto and Dari)
Additional Information
WHO has zero tolerance for sexual misconduct, inaction against it and any form of retaliation against victims/survivors or bystanders who disclose, report, or participate in an investigation. Parallel to technical competence, recruitment, selection and hiring decisions will give due emphasis to assessing candidates value congruence, thorough background checks and reference check processes. This will ensure children and vulnerable adults are safeguarded from abusers and that abusers are prevented from joining WHO Afghanistan office. Please report any concerning information regarding sexual exploitation and abuse by WHO workforce and partners to WHO office of Internal Oversight services at investigations@who.int
WHO is a smoke free environment.

Submission Guideline
Click on the link below and then click on ‘Register and Apply’ if you are not already registered with CTG.
Follow the steps to provide your details and register;
Provide the information marked in red.
Save your profile and upload copies of your qualification and CV.
Once your profile is created and saved go to Vacancies tab on the right corner.
Click on the vacancy that you want to apply for.
Provide your current employment details, date that you are available from and salary expectations.
Tick the boxes and click submit.
You will see your application under the Application tab
Tayo (tayohr.io)

Submission Email
https://app.tayohr.io/jobs/detail/vac-54752-database-developer-national-consultant-53471

expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary

هدف از این وظیفه، توسعه بازار، شناسایی و جذب فرصتهای جدید تجاری، مدیریت روابط با مشتریان و شرکا ، و

همکاری، و تقویت جایگاه شرکت در بازار خواهد بود.

Duties and Responsibilities

شناسایی، تحلیل وجذب مشتریان جدید) MSP ها، تجار، شرکتها

مدیریت روابط با مشتریان و شرکا ) Client & Partner Management):

مستندسازی جلسات، توافقات و پیشرفتها .

expiring_soon.title: IT & Western Union Assistant for Sar-e-Pol
expiring_soon.description:
About Bank-e-Millie Afghan (BMA)
Bank-e-Millie Afghan (BMA) is the foremost first financial institution of Afghanistan established in 1933. Similarly, it was the first financial institution established in a public-private partnership set up with a 72% share held by the private sector. As the first bank in the country, BMA introduced formal banking services to the people and government of Afghanistan. Since then, the bank’s competitive strength and ongoing market leadership philosophy lays in its strong capital base and proven trustworthiness. In 1976, it was fully nationalized by the government of Afghanistan. Since its establishment, BMA has been a leading bank in providing modern and secure banking services. Securing depositors' funds is the top priority of the bank. At the same time, the bank is contributing considerably to the development of manufacturing, agriculture, services, and international trade in the country. BMA is operating based on strong corporate governance principles, financial risk management, and strict compliance to keep its credibility and trust. At present, BMA has 17 City Branches including the HQ and 4 Counters in Kabul, 22 Provincial Branches and 3 Counters accompanied by a broader outlook and prospect for growth and expansion in near future, and equity investments in the USA and England.

Job Description
The Branch IT + Western Union (WU) Assistant is responsible for providing technical support and assistance with IT systems in the branch, ensuring the efficient operation of banking technology. Additionally, this role encompasses managing Western Union transactions and services, providing exceptional customer service, and ensuring compliance with relevant policies and procedures.
Key Duties and Responsibilities:
IT Support
Technical Assistance
Provide day-to-day technical support for all banking software and hardware used within the branch.
Troubleshoot and resolve hardware and software issues, ensuring minimal disruption to branch operations.
Branch IT related Items Maintenance
Assist in the maintenance and updating of branch IT systems, including computers, networks, and hardware’s.
Ensure that all IT equipment is functioning properly and coordinate with external vendors for repairs as needed.
Provide services to branch all IT items at least twice in a month
User Training
Train branch staff on the use of banking software, equipment, and IT best practices to enhance their operational efficiency.
Develop user guides and training materials for specific IT processes as required.
Data Security
Assist in monitoring and implementing security measures to protect branch IT systems and customer data.
Ensure compliance with data protection policies and procedures.
Reporting
Maintain accurate records of service requests and IT incidents, providing reports to the Branch Manager and IT Department as needed.
WU (Western Union) Operations
Transaction Processing
Manage and process Western Union transactions including Send and receive, ensuring that all transactions comply with WU policy and procedure.
Assist customers with inquiries related to Western Union services, providing accurate information and resolving any issues that arise.
Customer Service
Provide exceptional customer service to clients utilizing Western Union services, ensuring a positive customer experience.
Compliance and Reconciliations
Process all WU transactions as per AML/CFT policy.
Conduct daily basis reconciliation during end of the day.
Prepare and submit reports related to Western Union activities to the Branch Manager.
Compliance
Adhere to all regulatory and compliance requirements related to customer service and banking operations.
Assist with CSO of the branch in daily branch activities.
Punctuality. (Follow official working time schedule properly).
Behave in a professional way with all the colleagues and customers of the branch.
Any other task assigned by Line Manager or will be assigned other duties and responsibilities as may be required to meet the goals and objectives of the bank.

Job Requirements
Education: Bachelor’s degree in BCS and master’s degree is preferred.
Experience: 3 years of experience and previous experience in IT support within a banking or financial services environment is a plus.
Skills and Competencies:
Strong technical skills with proficiency in computer systems, networking, and common software applications.
Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to troubleshoot technical issues effectively.
Good communication and interpersonal skills, with a strong focus on customer service.
Ability to work collaboratively within a team and manage multiple tasks effectively.
Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.
Fluency in Dari, Pashto, and English is required.

Submission Guideline
Qualified and interested applicants are encouraged to apply online through the BMA Job Portal at https://jobs.bma.com.af before the closing date.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

Submission Email
https://jobs.bma.com.af

expiring_soon.title: IT Manager
expiring_soon.description:
About HPL
Honest Public Ltd (HPL) is a group of companies, specializing in providing exceptional management services throughout Afghanistan. With over 1500+ staff throughout the country, we specialize in Supply, Logistics, Security, Customer Care, Consultancy, and Construction services.
At HPL, our top priority is delivering reliable and efficient services that meet the unique needs of our clients.
Our dedicated team of professionals works closely with clients to provide customized solutions that ensure maximum satisfaction.
We take pride in our ability to provide timely and dependable services to our clients, and we are committed to upholding the highest standards of quality and professionalism. Our services are designed to help businesses and organizations in Afghanistan operate effectively, safely, and efficiently.

Job Description
Running regular checks on network and data security
Identifying and acting on opportunities to improve and update software and systems
Developing and implementing IT policy and best practice guides for the organization
Designing training programs and workshops for staff
Conducting regular system audits
Running and sharing regular operation system reports with senior staff
Overseeing and determining timeframes for major IT projects including system updates, upgrades, migrations and outages
Managing and reporting on allocation of IT budget
Providing direction for IT team members
Identifying opportunities for team training and skills advancemen
Any other tasks assigned by supervisor.

Job Requirements
Education : Minimum Bachelor degree in Computer Science or Information Technology, higher will be an advantage
Experience : Minimum 7 year of relevant experience in Information Technology
Experience in project management will be considered as asset.
Excellent Technical knowledge of network and PC hardware
Excellent trouble shooting knowledge.
Extensive experience in reporting and knowledge of major donor rules
Languages: Proficiency in both national languages and Excellent communication skills in English is required.
Excellent Conflict Management and people management skills
The incumbent must be Punctual, reliable and have strong communication skill
Self-Motivated, Quick learner with a positive attitude

Submission Guideline
To apply for the position, please follow these steps:
Open the link: HPL JOB APPLICATION FORM
Important Notes:
Please ensure that your current address and the specific job location you are applying for are clearly included in both your CV and application form .
Applications missing this information will not be accepted .
Applications received after the closing date will not be considered.
Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.
If you encounter any issues during the application process, please contact us at 0202201261 or email hr@hpl.af. (Please note: This email is not for CV submissions.)
Please Note that:
HPL commits to a fair and transparent recruitment procedure.
HPL will conduct its recruitment based on need only.
Only the HR department will contact you during the recruitment process.
Only short-listed candidates whose application responds to the criteria will be contacted & local applicants from the same province are encouraged to apply and will be given priority.
HPL is not responsible for any job announcements made on other websites or social media platforms. Only information shared through official channels will be considered valid.
HPL does not charge any fees at any stage of the recruitment process. Applying for a vacancy is completely free of charge .

Submission Email
visit this website (jobs.hpl.af) or click the link above "HPL JOB APPLICATION FORM"

details.Contract Duration: one Year (with possible extension based on performance)

tech_banking_jobs.title: IT & Western Union Assistant for Sar-e-Pol
tech_banking_jobs.description:
About Bank-e-Millie Afghan (BMA)
Bank-e-Millie Afghan (BMA) is the foremost first financial institution of Afghanistan established in 1933. Similarly, it was the first financial institution established in a public-private partnership set up with a 72% share held by the private sector. As the first bank in the country, BMA introduced formal banking services to the people and government of Afghanistan. Since then, the bank’s competitive strength and ongoing market leadership philosophy lays in its strong capital base and proven trustworthiness. In 1976, it was fully nationalized by the government of Afghanistan. Since its establishment, BMA has been a leading bank in providing modern and secure banking services. Securing depositors' funds is the top priority of the bank. At the same time, the bank is contributing considerably to the development of manufacturing, agriculture, services, and international trade in the country. BMA is operating based on strong corporate governance principles, financial risk management, and strict compliance to keep its credibility and trust. At present, BMA has 17 City Branches including the HQ and 4 Counters in Kabul, 22 Provincial Branches and 3 Counters accompanied by a broader outlook and prospect for growth and expansion in near future, and equity investments in the USA and England.

Job Description
The Branch IT + Western Union (WU) Assistant is responsible for providing technical support and assistance with IT systems in the branch, ensuring the efficient operation of banking technology. Additionally, this role encompasses managing Western Union transactions and services, providing exceptional customer service, and ensuring compliance with relevant policies and procedures.
Key Duties and Responsibilities:
IT Support
Technical Assistance
Provide day-to-day technical support for all banking software and hardware used within the branch.
Troubleshoot and resolve hardware and software issues, ensuring minimal disruption to branch operations.
Branch IT related Items Maintenance
Assist in the maintenance and updating of branch IT systems, including computers, networks, and hardware’s.
Ensure that all IT equipment is functioning properly and coordinate with external vendors for repairs as needed.
Provide services to branch all IT items at least twice in a month
User Training
Train branch staff on the use of banking software, equipment, and IT best practices to enhance their operational efficiency.
Develop user guides and training materials for specific IT processes as required.
Data Security
Assist in monitoring and implementing security measures to protect branch IT systems and customer data.
Ensure compliance with data protection policies and procedures.
Reporting
Maintain accurate records of service requests and IT incidents, providing reports to the Branch Manager and IT Department as needed.
WU (Western Union) Operations
Transaction Processing
Manage and process Western Union transactions including Send and receive, ensuring that all transactions comply with WU policy and procedure.
Assist customers with inquiries related to Western Union services, providing accurate information and resolving any issues that arise.
Customer Service
Provide exceptional customer service to clients utilizing Western Union services, ensuring a positive customer experience.
Compliance and Reconciliations
Process all WU transactions as per AML/CFT policy.
Conduct daily basis reconciliation during end of the day.
Prepare and submit reports related to Western Union activities to the Branch Manager.
Compliance
Adhere to all regulatory and compliance requirements related to customer service and banking operations.
Assist with CSO of the branch in daily branch activities.
Punctuality. (Follow official working time schedule properly).
Behave in a professional way with all the colleagues and customers of the branch.
Any other task assigned by Line Manager or will be assigned other duties and responsibilities as may be required to meet the goals and objectives of the bank.

Job Requirements
Education: Bachelor’s degree in BCS and master’s degree is preferred.
Experience: 3 years of experience and previous experience in IT support within a banking or financial services environment is a plus.
Skills and Competencies:
Strong technical skills with proficiency in computer systems, networking, and common software applications.
Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to troubleshoot technical issues effectively.
Good communication and interpersonal skills, with a strong focus on customer service.
Ability to work collaboratively within a team and manage multiple tasks effectively.
Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.
Fluency in Dari, Pashto, and English is required.

Submission Guideline
Qualified and interested applicants are encouraged to apply online through the BMA Job Portal at https://jobs.bma.com.af before the closing date.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

Submission Email
https://jobs.bma.com.af
